reviews.review_title: Really cool! and cool dev team
reviews.review_description:
This game was an blast for me
 i played yesterday and tomorrow,
 but today i got to play with a dev and he showed me some cool dev only items and he said some content creator stuff,
 since i was recording all this 
(im gonna post this as unlisted, so only some people can see the vid) good dev team good game! and he said some new stuff coming out (pls don't fire or demote him hes really cool)

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing my game! We arent gonna ban or demote him, just because he showed cool dev only items

reviews.review_description: So I played Richard’s company yesterday recorded a video me and my friends loved it a lot and also if you make a finger painter or whatever content creator ￼you should 100% give it to me also put headphones that say board man on  it w game.￼

developer_response.body: You shouldn’t really say that, but thanks for playing the game and giving it 5 stars!
